reasoning: The 'unsafe' verdict stemmed from update_boost.sh which isn't executed during AUR build/install. All other files show standard packaging practices with pinned sources and security patches.
disagreement_analysis: Qwen3 incorrectly flagged src/cbang/scripts/update_boost.sh as unsafe despite it not being invoked by PKGBUILD/build processes
coverage_issues: deepseek missed reviewing update_boost.sh (found by Qwen3)
false_positives: Qwen3's update_boost.sh verdict: script isn't called by PKGBUILD/build functions
learnings: Prioritize scripts referenced in PKGBUILD functions over development utilities
